text: Welcome aboard, newbie_kim! You’re approved as a member. Start by introducing yourself and checking out the getting-started resources.
Welcome aboard, helper_alex! You’re approved as a moderator. Please review the community guidelines and mod handbook before jumping in.
Welcome aboard, guide_sam! You’re approved as an event_helper. Check the events calendar and volunteer doc to see where you can jump in.
Welcome aboard, mentor_lina! You’re approved as a mentor. Please review the mentorship guidelines and set your availability in the mentorship channel.
